message:
📝 Release notes body

 ## What's new in v4.5
 
 ### ✨ New template columns
 | Column | Name | What it does |
 |--------|------|-------------|
 | G | **New Page** | Force a page break before this block |
 | H | **Carry Row** | Pull the last table row with this block onto the new page (with header) |
 
 These solve the common issue of signature/summary blocks appearing alone on a new page with no context.
 
 ### 🗂️ Updated block types guide
 The visual reference embedded in the Template tab now documents all column options (E–H).
 
 ---
 
 ### ⚠️ Action required on upgrade
 Templates from v4.4 or earlier are missing columns G and H.
 **Regenerate your template** (Generate Sample Template or Generate Filled Template) before running the report.
